ocr_findings.description: Page number '424' appears at the bottom of the OCR text rather than being omitted or placed at top — cosmetic ordering issue only

reviewer_notes: Lesson 12-05 情報デザインとソフトウェアの権利 opener. All three sections (わかりやすく伝える anecdote, 情報デザインに関する用語 overview, ユニバーサルデザイン definition including バリアフリー distinction) accurately transcribed. Illustration for the '熱いものは赤色' vending machine anecdote replaced by image placeholder as expected. OCR is clean and faithful.
